name: Watercress and Herb Salad with Gingery Asian Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon minced lemon grass from the bottom third of the inner stalk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, whisk together minced fresh ginger, sesame oil, lemon juice, white vinegar, fish sauce (if using), Tabasco sauce, minced lemon grass, sugar, salt, and white pepper until well blended.
2. In a large bowl, combine watercress, cilantro leaves, mint leaves, and tomato quarters.
3. Stir in the dressing just enough to moisten the salad ingredients, then toss to coat.
4. Serve and enjoy.
SERVES 4 to 6. (Per sixth: 75 calories, 6 grams fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 25 milligrams sodium.)
